incident_legal_mapping.name: Abandonment of Child / Child Desertion
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Call 1098 (Childline) and 112 immediately.

legal_mapping.intent: Punishment for abandonment of child under 12 years

incident_legal_mapping.name: Acid Attack
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Emergency medical aid and immediate FIR. Free treatment is mandatory.

legal_mapping.intent: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt by acid attack

action_guide: File FIR under acid attack laws

incident_legal_mapping.name: Adulteration of Food or Drink
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Report to Food Safety Officer or FSSAI portal.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Animal Cruelty
related_laws: Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Inform local SPCA or Police Station.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Bribery & Corruption
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Contact State Vigilance or Anti-Corruption Bureau (ACB).

incident_legal_mapping.name: Cheating & Dishonest Inducement
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: File FIR and seek legal counsel for recovery suit.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Child Marriage
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Contact Childline 1098 or District Magistrate.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Cyber Fraud & UPI Scams
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Call 1930 and report on cybercrime.gov.in within the 'Golden Hour'.

legal_mapping.intent: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property

action_guide: Contact RBI Ombudsman for banking fraud

incident_legal_mapping.name: Mobile Phone Theft / Lost Phone
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Report to police, block SIM/IMEI immediately, and inform bank.
action_guide: Block SIM card with telecom provider

incident_legal_mapping.name: Defamation
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: File a private criminal complaint in court.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Domestic Violence
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Call 1091 or 112. Seek protection order from Magistrate.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Dowry Death
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Immediate Police Intervention. Mandatory Executive Magistrate inquest.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Drunk Driving
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Police can arrest without warrant if BAC > 30mg/100ml.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Environmental Pollution
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Complaint to State Pollution Control Board (SPCB).

incident_legal_mapping.name: Illegal Arrest / Detention
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Apply for Habeas Corpus in High Court.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Kidnapping & Abduction
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Dial 112. Police must register FIR immediately (Zero FIR).

incident_legal_mapping.name: Medical Negligence
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Complaint to State Medical Council and Consumer Forum.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Noise Pollution
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Call 112 or local Police Station. Prohibited 10 PM to 6 AM.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Outraging Modesty / Molestation
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: File FIR. Statement must be recorded by a woman police officer.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Police Refusal to Register FIR
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Send complaint to SP via post or approach Magistrate under 156(3) / 175.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Sexual Harassment at Workplace
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Complain to Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) of the company.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Sexual Assault / Rape
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Immediate medical exam (Do not wash/change). File FIR. 112/181.
risk_audit: Do not wash or change clothes

incident_legal_mapping.name: Caste Based Discrimination / Atrocity
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Immediate FIR under specialized act. Mandatory compensation.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Neglect of Senior Citizens
related_laws: Maintenance and Welfare of Parents Act, 2007
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Approach Maintenance Tribunal (SDM Office).

incident_legal_mapping.name: Stalking
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Report to Police. First offense is bailable, second is non-bailable.

incident_legal_mapping.name: Theft
incident_legal_mapping.recommended_action: Dial 112. For mobiles, report on Sanchar Saathi portal.
